---
title: "Edward Wogale"
---

## Edward Wogale

**Dates:** (before 1849-<i>c.</i> 1880)

### Description

brother of the Rev. George Sarawia, Melanesian missionary

### Biography

See Blain, <i>Biographical Dictionary of Anglicans in the Pacific</i> at http://anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/

### Letters

- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
